subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and verily He Who speaketh is He Who proclaimed in the eternity of eternities: "Verily I am" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی یقول انه لهو الذی قال فی ازل الازال اننی
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @blind imitation [taqlid], @prophecy and fulfillment, @chastisement and requital, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @idolatry
